best_eval:
---
overall_score: 7
magic_system: 7 -- The system otherwise excels: costs drive all plot (memory loss forces relationship dilemmas), societal implications are specific and numerous (administrative nightmare, love as finite resource, rain-avoidance economy), and testability is high. The problem is confined to the final act.
world_history: 6 -- The decorative myth is beautiful but plot-irrelevant. The history that matters (1994 formation, Minh's erasure) is well-documented; what's missing is the connective tissue that makes it feel inevitable rather than arbitrary.
geography_and_culture: 9 -- Exceptional work. Huế is not a painted backdrop but a living system where geography (Hương Thủy's floods, Bạch Mã's rain barrier, sông Hương's memory-saturated water) directly enables or constrains character action. Food customs (bún bò cay before rain) and superstitions (black umbrellas, naming taboo) generate real plot tension.
lore_interconnection: 8 -- The core triangle (magic → memory loss → love as finite resource → control vs. freedom) is tight. Every element feeds the thematic question. The interconnection is genuinely impressive.
iceberg_depth: 7 -- The implied depth is otherwise strong: the sound-in-rain phenomenon, mirror lag, memory-scent connection, and Hoa hậu lan's blooming all suggest a world deeper than what's explained. The problem is concentrated in origin questions.
character_depth: 8 -- Linh, Tuấn, Minh, and Hằng have exemplary chains. Linh's lie ('love needs memory to be real') follows causally from her wound (knowing she loved but not feeling it). Minh's lie ('control is love') follows from his wound (being forgotten by everyone he loved). The causal logic is strong.
character_distinctiveness: 8 -- Otherwise excellent. Removing dialogue tags, Linh's half-finished sentences and Hằng's date-stamped specificity are immediately identifiable. Tuấn's nostalgic preambles ('Hồi đó mình...') and Phong's deflection-through-humor are distinct. The voice profiles are actionable.
character_secrets: 8 -- Linh's secret (trying to stop loving Tuấn) directly opposes Tuấn's arc and would devastate him if revealed. Tuấn's shifting affection would reframe the Linh-Tuấn-Hằng triangle. Hằng's love for Linh motivates her fear of Rửa. Minh's surveillance explains the mưa pattern. These are strong.
outline_completeness: 9 -- Otherwise exceptionally complete. Every chapter has POV, location, Save the Cat beat, emotional arc, try-fail cycle, and plant/harvest notes. The MICE quotient is correct (Milieu→Inquiry→Event→Character opening, reversed closing). Act breaks hit target percentages.
foreshadowing_balance: 9 -- The tracking system is exemplary: 40 threads with type classification, plant/cement/harvest chapters, and a statistical breakdown. 80% have ≥3 chapter distance. The thread types are diverse (sensory, object, action, dialogue, world-rule, relationship, structural). This is professional-level continuity management.
internal_consistency: 5 -- These are not minor continuity errors—they affect the climax and the core premise. A writer would need to resolve them before drafting the final act. The documents are otherwise meticulous about dates, ages, and event sequences.
voice_clarity: 9 -- The voice definition is among the strongest elements. The exemplar passage is genuinely literary Vietnamese with varied rhythm, sensory grounding, and emotional restraint. The metaphor wells (water/rain, incense/karma, erosion) are culturally resonant and actionable. The 'body before emotion' rule is clear and enforced.
canon_coverage: 9 -- Coverage is otherwise exhaustive: dates, ages, locations, relationship states, faction positions, and cultural customs are all sourced and cross-referenced. The canon document alone would catch most drafting errors.
slop_in_planning_docs: N/A -- The creative prose exemplars and dialogue are clean of AI slop. The Vietnamese literary writing is natural, with proper particles, regional markers, and culturally authentic metaphor. Issues are confined to the meta-planning layer where the author mixes English analytical terms into Vietnamese framework text.
contradictions_found: ["Partial Rửa (Ch 23) vs. Rule 3 ('thay đổi luôn là chuyển giới hoàn toàn') and Rule 4 ('một năm dương lịch tròn')—Linh's change is incomplete and takes only a fragment of memory, not a full year", "Memory-insertion mechanic (Ch 22, Minh's plan to fill emptied minds) absent from world bible's hard rules—introduced only at climax without prior establishment", "Hằng's non-Rửa status after 6 years vs. world bible statement 'trung bình, trong một năm, cả năm người đều bị Rửa ít nhất một lần'—acknowledged as mystery but not reconciled with the stated rule", "Minor: Tuấn's Rửa count in world bible says 'hai lần Rửa sau chỉ lấy năm 1995 và 1997' but characters.md says his last Rửa took memories of Hằng, not Linh—implies a fourth Rửa not accounted for in the 'three times' count, or the count needs updating"]
lore_score: 7
weakest_dimension: internal_consistency
top_3_improvements: ['Resolve the climax contradictions: Either foreshadow partial Rửa and memory insertion as rare exceptions (add to world bible with conditions), or revise Ch 22-23 to work within established hard rules. This is the single highest-leverage fix because it affects the ending and forces no other changes.', "Deepen Phong's wound/want/need/lie chain to match the other characters. Currently he's a thematic counterweight without causal depth. One paragraph linking his emotional numbness to a pre-1994 experience would bring him to parity.", 'Add one causal historical event between Lần Gãy and 1994 that explains why the Ủy Ban fears Vòngs and why Bà Lụa tracks them. This would transform decorative history into plot-driving tension and give the political faction clearer motivation.']
